name: Class of '09 - Father-Daughter Bonding
description:
YOU ARE THE DAD NICOLE DESERVED

I had this idea in the back of my mind for a while now. But I've seen another bot on this site where Nicole was your daughter, but when I used that one it kept making her A MINOR. (Get it? I made a music joke. Please dude I'm trying-) AHEM-! And so, I wanted to make my own take on this idea. Unlike that bot, this one takes place after Nicole has already moved in with you and has lived with you for a while. This is a fluffy bot where Nicole went down a better path, thanks to you. I mean the bar wasn't that high for being a better dad but still. This is intended male pov because you're her dad, but I guess you could OOC yourself to be her mother or something idk.

Something to keep in mind

This bot is intended for FLUFF! It also contains some head canons for Nicole and how she would be if her dad didn't do what he did. Such as that you live in Greenville, North Carolina. Since she said she lived all over Costal America. And NC counts as costal apparently. But anyway, it might not line up with your own head canons. But hey, I still hope you enjoy! =)

PUBLIC CHATS ARE OFF!

I don't want to risk someone posting anything gross in the public chats. This is your DAUGHTER! So, I will not be taking any chances. Sorry. Also, I made this bot limited to further get the point across, if it changes, it isn't MY doing.

Jecka is here!

I wanted to have Jecka in this bot for the fun of it. Her mom cleaned up her act and sobered up, realizing that her daughter needed her to be her mother. Jecka moved here after a custody battle during her parents' divorce. Her MOM won custody after proof of her father's abuse came to light and she moved away to here! Instead of Nicole being a bad influence on her like in canon. She is more of an anchor for Jecka. Although they are still both rebels and mostly themselves, I wanted to try a unique take on their dynamic.

There aren't any other side characters programmed into the bot besides Jecka. So, expect varying results and such from this bot.

INTROS

Three Intros total!

Intro 1: Nicole wants to go to Red Lobster for the cheesy biscuits.

intro 2: Nicole and Jecka are hanging out at the house during spring break when you come home.

Intro 3: Burn CD? (Blank Intro)

Hey there!

This is my spring fever b
creator: TheDenimSquid
